sourceOfTruth: Append new product or runtime guarantees to features[] and rerun npm run qa:matrix.
releaseRule: A feature is production-ready only when deterministic tests, live/backend smoke where applicable, traceability, privacy boundaries, and documented failure behavior are all present.

features.claim: Users can upload/view files and work with parsed spreadsheets in the same room.
features.productionGate: Parser fixtures, provider parser adapter tests, live file preview smoke, and Convex raw-file canonicalization.
liveChecks: manual browser: click file in left rail and return to Spreadsheet tab
features.nextReview: Add live Convex File Storage upload/download E2E once deployment auth is finalized.

features.claim: Public chat, private chat, public room agent, and private agent route messages to the right scope.
features.productionGate: Scope separation tests, room member proof, and browser smoke for public/private panels.
liveChecks: manual browser: public chat and private NodeAgent panels visible and usable
features.nextReview: Add browser E2E for message routing once a Playwright harness is committed.

features.claim: Room trace supports approve/reject, host accept-all, and host-gated auto-accept with remembered consent.
features.productionGate: Host-only controls, proposal resolution tests, UI consent modal, and no silent direct-write bypass.
liveChecks: manual browser: turn auto-allow on, confirm modal, run collaboration, accept all proposals
features.nextReview: Add audit assertion that accept-all records every accepted proposal id.

features.claim: GTM, finance, parser, wiki, and cross-file operation workflows are covered by deterministic professional evals and live provider smoke.
features.productionGate: Deterministic workflow evals pass, provider parser smoke is green, and model routes are ladder-gated before interactive promotion.
features.nextReview: Add dedicated live GTM and finance provider jobs with row-level trace assertions.

features.claim: The agent can read spreadsheets, write notes/wiki updates, reconcile cells, and keep cross-artifact evidence links.
features.productionGate: Cross-file RoomTools test, grounded wiki write test, and CAS conflict checks.
liveChecks: manual browser: run collaboration and inspect note/wiki/spreadsheet trace
features.nextReview: Add LLM-generated wiki update eval with private-data leakage checks.

features.claim: Users can create and delete post-its through versioned room operations.
features.productionGate: Create/delete operation tests and browser smoke for Wall tab.
liveChecks: manual browser: Wall tab Post-it add/delete
features.nextReview: Add multi-user wall edit conflict browser test.

features.claim: Multiple users can join, see reactive state, use public/private scopes, and avoid clobbering through locks/CAS/proposals/drafts.
features.productionGate: Room auth proof, Convex codegen/typecheck, duplicate-operation idempotency, load/concurrency smoke, and deployment observability.
features.nextReview: Add concurrent browser/session load test and production SLO dashboard.

features.claim: Free-auto provider work can run as sliced jobs that checkpoint before platform limits and resume from durable state.
features.productionGate: Forced multi-slice test, crash-after-checkpoint resume, duplicate stale lease rejection, and live /free smoke.
features.nextReview: Add duplicate enqueue idempotency, stricter budget clamps, per-tool abort propagation, durable provider-step journaling, model health/quarantine, and real forced multi-slice Convex job-runner tests.

features.claim: Provider file/cache ids stay separate from Convex raw file ids while extraction writes evidence-bearing CellPayloads.
features.productionGate: Adapter separation tests, live provider smoke, redacted errors, and artifact evidence checks.
features.nextReview: Add production provider Files API binary upload actions for PDFs/images/decks.

features.claim: The QA matrix, README cockpit, and visual graphs are generated from one appendable source of truth.
features.productionGate: Matrix schema tests and qa:matrix --check drift detection.
features.nextReview: Require each new user-facing feature PR to append or update one matrix row.

modelLadder.gate: Interactive collaboration routes must pass L1-L4 for lock/CAS/draft safety.

routes.recommendedUse: eligible for interactive collaboration promotion after repeated runs
research benchmark winner candidate only when collaboration safety is not required
requires rerun because L2 time-budget failure blocks promotion
